name: Clementine
description: Joint NASA/DoD Strategic Defense Initiative mission, 1994. Spent ten weeks mapping the Moon at 11 spectral bands — the first systematic global multispectral map. Bistatic radar measurements at the south pole produced the first hints of polar water ice, later confirmed by Lunar Prospector and Chandrayaan-1.
scale_fact: Lunar polar orbit ~425 km altitude. First hint of lunar water — the discovery that motivates every modern south-pole mission, including Artemis III.
